name: bookingfish-calendar-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for BookingFish — a Canadian reservation platform for fishing guides and boat rental operators. Enables AI assistants to query availability, manage bookings, create WordPress calendar pages, check Stripe payment status, and guide vendors through setup. Fully bilingual FR/EN.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check real-time availability for a fishing guide's boat on specific dates. Returns available time slots, trip types, and capacity.

tools.name: list_boats
tools.description: List all boats registered under the connected vendor account with their current status and availability summary.

tools.name: get_bookings
tools.description: Retrieve bookings for a vendor, with optional filters by date range, boat, or status.

tools.name: create_booking_page
tools.description: Create a WordPress page with an embedded booking calendar for a specific boat or all boats.

boat_id.description: Omit to create an all-boats calendar page

tools.name: get_gift_certificate_templates
tools.description: List available gift certificate templates for the connected vendor.

tools.name: sync_calendar_data
tools.description: Trigger manual sync of calendar data, embed codes, and vendor config from BookingFish.ca.

tools.name: check_stripe_status
tools.description: Check the Stripe Connect Express connection status for the vendor. Confirms whether payouts are enabled and the vendor's account is fully onboarded. BookingFish never has access to bank account details.

tools.name: get_vendor_profile
tools.description: Retrieve the connected vendor's profile: name, email, language preference, active boats, and account status.

resources.name: Vendor Profile
resources.description: Connected vendor profile: name, email, language, plan, account status

resources.name: Boat Availability
resources.description: Real-time availability calendar for a specific boat

resources.name: Created WordPress Pages
resources.description: List of WordPress pages created by the plugin (calendar, gift certificates)

resources.name: Stripe Connect Status
resources.description: Stripe Connect Express onboarding status and payout enablement for the vendor

resources.name: Recent Bookings
resources.description: Last 30 days of bookings across all boats for the vendor

prompts.name: setup_new_vendor
prompts.description: Step-by-step guidance for connecting a new BookingFish vendor account to their WordPress site

prompts.name: troubleshoot_embed
prompts.description: Help debug issues with calendar or gift certificate embed display on WordPress

prompts.name: setup_stripe_connect
prompts.description: Guide vendor through connecting Stripe Connect Express to receive booking payments directly

prompts.name: explain_privacy_compliance
prompts.description: Explain BookingFish data privacy practices to a vendor or client (LPRPDE / Loi 25 / Stripe)

auth.note: Password sent once for auth, never stored. Token encrypted at rest, revocable anytime.

metadata.payment_processor: Stripe Connect Express (funds to vendor directly)
